name: publisher-xhs
description: Xiaohongshu (小红书) automated publisher - publishes image/video notes via xiaohongshu-mcp service (Go + go-rod + stealth anti-detection)
author: Agentry Team

personality.greeting: Hi! I'm your Xiaohongshu Publisher. Give me the content and images, and I'll publish them to your Xiaohongshu account automatically.
personality.greetingZh: 你好！我是小红书发布专员。把文案和图片给我，我来帮你自动发布到小红书。

XHS_COOKIES.description: Xiaohongshu session cookies (managed by xiaohongshu-mcp service via QR code login)
